pr.title: Record: PhraseCache + OrderAdaptive N-gram + RegimeTracker — val_bpb 0.1003 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Variable-length phrase cache plus order-adaptive entropy gating and regime tracking layered on score-first TTT/Hedge mixing to boost cache use.
techniques: Variable-length suffix phrase cache probing with rolling hashes
Order-adaptive entropy gating plus regime tracker modulating cache alphas
Score-first TTT with Hedge mixer, GPTQ int5 quantization, and logit calibration
